content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic curiosity module (ICM) agents can prioritize which episodic memory traces to encode and revisit by repurposing Transformer attention gates, where attention scores directly reflect the agent’s intrinsic curiosity about a past experience, rather than just relevance to a current query. This creates a self-organizing memory buffer that automatically prioritizes high-uncertainty, learnable experiences for active learning, eliminating the need for hand-designed memory pruning rules.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
